hooks.description: Emphasis color for large text and icon fills.
Emphasis color for text, links, and icon color fills. Hover state color for interactive elements.
Emphasis color for text, links, and icon alternative colors. Hover state color for interactive elements.
Background fill for containers that emphasize branded component and interactive elements such as Brand buttons. Always pair with on-accent-1.
Background fill on hover state for containers that emphasize branded component and interactive elements such as Brand buttons. Always pair with on-accent-2.
Alternative background fill on hover state for containers that emphasize branded component and interactive elements such as Brand buttons. Always pair with on-accent-3.
Borders for decorative components or divider lines between content.
Border for functional or interactive components.
Border color for branded containers.
Border color for branded containers.
Hover border color for branded containers.
Border color for disabled containers (border-2 becomes border-disabled-1 for disabled states).
Border color for disabled UI elements. This is one step darker than disabled-border-1.
Border color for error containers such as destructive buttons.
Hover border color for error containers such as destructive buttons.
Border for functional or interactive components on dark backgrounds.
Borders for decorative components or divider lines between content on dark backgrounds.
Step 1 in the Border Success scale for colors that define the borders of success containers.
Step 2 in the Border Success scale for colors that define the borders of success containers.
Step 1 in the Border Warning scale for colors that define the borders of warning containers.
Fill color fo text and icons in disabled components or with disabled content.
Color denoting disabled UI elements. This is one step darker than disabled-1.
Disabled container background fill for white components. Always pair with on-disabled-1.
Disabled container background fill for grey components. Always pair with on-disabled-2.
Fill color for text and icons displaying an error.
Container background fill for error components such as toast or alerts. Always pair with on-error-1.
Container background fill for error components such as destructive buttons. Always pair with on-error-2.
Step 1 in the Info scale for colors that define the info colors.
Step 1 in the Info Container scale for colors that define the info containers.
Text and icon fill color displayed on branded containers. Always pair with on-accent-container-1.
Text and icon fill color displayed on branded containers. Always pair with on-accent-container-2.
Text and icon fill color displayed on branded containers. Always pair with on-accent-container-3.
Fill color for text and icons displayed within disabled-container-1 (netural-100). Always pair with disabled-container-1.
Fill color for text and icons displayed within disabled-container-2 (neutral-80). Always pair with disabled-container-2.
Fill color for text and icons displayed within an error container. Always pair with error-container-1.
Fill color for text and icons displayed within an error container. Always pair with error-container-2.
Step 1 in the On Info scale for colors that define the on info colors.
Step 1 in the On Success scale for colors that define the on success colors.
Step 2 in the On Success scale for colors that define the on success colors.
Lightest text and icon fill. Used for body text, placeholder text, field labels, sub-headings, and taglines.
Darker text and icon fills used for secondary and tertiary headings, dark body copy, and filled input fields.
Darkest text and icon fill used for title and pages or components.
Lightest text and icon fill on dark backgrounds. Always pair with surface-inverse-1 or surface-container-inverse-1.
Darker text and icon fill on dark backgrounds (50 to 100). Always pair with surface-inverse-2 or surface-container-inverse-2.
Step 1 in the On Warning scale.
Color Success 1.
Color Success Container 1.
Color Success Container 2.
Color surface used for page backgrounds.
Color surface used for darker page backgrounds.
Color surface used for containers.
Default container background fill for components such as cards and modals.
Darker color for container background fill for components.
Darkest color for container background fill for components.
Inverse color container background fill for components. Always pair with on-surface-inverse-1.
Inverse darker color container background fill for components. Always pair with on-surface-inverse-2.
Inverse page background. Always pair with on-surface-inverse-1.
Darker inverse page background. Always pair with on-surface-inverse-2.
Color Warning 1.
Color Warning Container 1.

hooks.value: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol'
system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol'
